## What

One sentence on what this PR does.

## Why

The motivation. If this fixes an issue, link it (`Fixes #123`).

## How

What changed and any non-obvious decisions.

## Tests

- [ ] `zig build test` passes
- [ ] `zig build test-wasmtime` passes (or skipped because Python deps
      aren't set up)
- [ ] Added/updated test cases under `test/` for behaviour changes

## Checklist

- [ ] `zig fmt` clean
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under *Unreleased*
- [ ] All commits signed off (`git commit -s`)
